languages.text: "Бог-Император благоволит покорности обреченных. Но почему мы должны вам верить?"

traits.locale_text: "Бог-Император благоволит покорности обреченных. Но почему мы должны вам верить?"

languages.text: "The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"
languages.original_text: "Бог-Император благоволит покорности обреченных. Но почему мы должны вам верить?"

traits.locale_text: "The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"
"The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"
"The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"

languages.text: “注定灭亡的人若能臣服，神皇也会欣然接纳。可我们凭什么相信你？”
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"

traits.locale_text: “注定灭亡的人若能臣服，神皇也会欣然接纳。可我们凭什么相信你？”

languages.text: « L'Empereur-Dieu porte un regard favorable sur la soumission des condamnés, mais pourquoi devrions-nous vous croire ? »
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"

traits.locale_text: « L'Empereur-Dieu porte un regard favorable sur la soumission des condamnés, mais pourquoi devrions-nous vous croire ? »

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator, lanetlilerin teslimiyetine olumlu bakıyor. Fakat sana neden inanalım?"
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator, lanetlilerin teslimiyetine olumlu bakıyor. Fakat sana neden inanalım?"

languages.text: «El Dios Emperador acepta la sumisión de los condenados, pero ¿por qué habríamos de creerle?».
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"

traits.locale_text: «El Dios Emperador acepta la sumisión de los condenados, pero ¿por qué habríamos de creerle?».

languages.text: "Der Gottimperator blickt wohlwollen auf die Unterwerfung der Todgeweihten. Aber warum sollten wir Euch glauben?"
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"

traits.locale_text: "Der Gottimperator blickt wohlwollen auf die Unterwerfung der Todgeweihten. Aber warum sollten wir Euch glauben?"

languages.text: 「神皇帝は滅びゆく者たちの降伏を好意的に見ている。だが、なぜ我々は君を信じるべきか？」
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor looks favourably on the submission of the doomed. But why should we believe you?"

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝は滅びゆく者たちの降伏を好意的に見ている。だが、なぜ我々は君を信じるべきか？」
